2162510.name: Fish the Detective!
2162510.description:
A noir-themed game about trading.

This game is about a fish who must get back to the ocean from a town of unbalanced math equations. You must go into the shops to trade with the townspeople, themselves math symbols, to find an item that gets you to the ocean.

Cute n' funny dialogue
About a half-hour of gameplay
A cartoonish capturing of noir fiction

WORKING ON INVENTORY SCREEN.
2162510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
